'''鈭歴h-y-d-d''' ('''kashaydedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrocoat|electrocoat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrocoat|electrocoat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-y-d-d
|-
! Lemma
| kashaydedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishaydedoko|thishaydedoko]] || [[word:jishaydedoko|jishaydedoko]] || [[word:shishaydedoko|shishaydedoko]] || [[word:kishaydedoko|kishaydedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushaydedoko|thuthushaydedoko]] || [[word:jujushaydedoko|jujushaydedoko]] || [[word:shushushaydedoko|shushushaydedoko]] || [[word:kukushaydedoko|kukushaydedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushaydedoko|thushaydedoko]] || [[word:jushaydedoko|jushaydedoko]] || [[word:shushaydedoko|shushaydedoko]] || [[word:kushaydedoko|kushaydedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushaydedoko|thushaydedoko]] || [[word:jushaydedoko|jushaydedoko]] || [[word:shushaydedoko|shushaydedoko]] || [[word:kushaydedoko|kushaydedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshaydedoko|theshaydedoko]] || [[word:jeshaydedoko|jeshaydedoko]] || [[word:sheshaydedoko|sheshaydedoko]] || [[word:keshaydedoko|keshaydedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshaydedoko|thothoshaydedoko]] || [[word:jojoshaydedoko|jojoshaydedoko]] || [[word:shoshoshaydedoko|shoshoshaydedoko]] || [[word:kokoshaydedoko|kokoshaydedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshaydedoko|thoshaydedoko]] || [[word:joshaydedoko|joshaydedoko]] || [[word:shoshaydedoko|shoshaydedoko]] || [[word:koshaydedoko|koshaydedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshaydedoko|thoshaydedoko]] || [[word:joshaydedoko|joshaydedoko]] || [[word:shoshaydedoko|shoshaydedoko]] || [[word:koshaydedoko|koshaydedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shaydedoko|th忙shaydedoko]] || [[word:j忙shaydedoko|j忙shaydedoko]] || [[word:sh忙shaydedoko|sh忙shaydedoko]] || [[word:k忙shaydedoko|k忙shaydedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashaydedoko|thathashaydedoko]] || [[word:jajashaydedoko|jajashaydedoko]] || [[word:shashashaydedoko|shashashaydedoko]] || [[word:kakashaydedoko|kakashaydedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashaydedoko|thashaydedoko]] || [[word:jashaydedoko|jashaydedoko]] || [[word:shashaydedoko|shashaydedoko]] || [[word:kashaydedoko|kashaydedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashaydedoko|thashaydedoko]] || [[word:jashaydedoko|jashaydedoko]] || [[word:shashaydedoko|shashaydedoko]] || [[word:kashaydedoko|kashaydedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
